metadata.title: Known Malicious Process Hash Execution (Operator Template)
metadata.author: Forensicator.
metadata.description: TEMPLATE RULE — Detects execution of processes whose Sysmon-logged SHA256 or MD5 hash matches known malicious samples. Edit the values arrays under selection_sha256 and selection_md5 to add your IOC hashes. Sysmon logs hashes in the format SHA256=<hash> or MD5=<hash>,SHA256=<hash>,IMPHASH=<hash> so partial match via contains is used. NOTE: The Forensicator hash scanner (md5hashes.txt + custom_hashes.txt) provides broader and faster hash-based detection across ALL files on disk. This Sigma rule targets ONLY live process executions captured by Sysmon.

title: Known Malicious Process Hash Execution (Operator Template)
